data_collected.source_quote: Shipt collects categories of personal information from customers and Members including information about the categories of sources from which personal information is collected.

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Shipt discloses personal information to vendors and service providers who perform services on its behalf.

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Shipt shares personal information with third parties for cross-contextual behavioral advertising.

cross_site_tracking.source_quote: Shipt uses cross-contextual behavioral advertising which includes online ads targeted to user interests.

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Shipt shares data for targeted advertising purposes with third parties.

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Shipt discloses personal information to vendors and service providers who perform services on behalf of Shipt, and may share with Target Corporation subsidiaries and affiliates.

retention_period.value: As long as needed plus legal requirements
retention_period.source_quote: Shipt retains personal information for as long as needed to provide services and comply with legal obligations. Biometric identifiers retained only as long as necessary but not more than 3 years.

access_your_data.source_quote: Users have the right to portability (receive personal information in a portable format) and access.

delete_your_data.source_quote: Users have the right to deletion of personal information by contacting Shipt at 877-557-1484.

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Users have the right to correction of personal information.

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: Users can opt out of the sale or sharing of personal information for cross-contextual behavioral advertising.

data_portability.source_quote: Users have the right to portability (receive personal information in a portable, usable format).

gaps: GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Shipt provides comprehensive user rights including access, delete, correct, opt-out, and portability. Uses biometric identification with 3-year maximum retention. Shares data with Target Corporation and advertising partners for behavioral targeting. Limited security information disclosed. Shoppers can contact 877-557-1484 to exercise rights or use privacy intake form at shipt.com/privacy/intake-form.
